brandStatement: Hammock Property Inspections provides clear, professional home inspections in Florida, combining thorough reporting, drone-assisted capability, and an analytical approach clients can trust.

contact.serviceAreaBadge: Brevard County and surrounding Space Coast communities

hero.headline: Professional Home Inspections on Florida’s Space Coast
hero.subheadline: Clear, thorough inspections with straightforward reporting and transparent pricing — so you know exactly what you’re getting.

services.title: Full Home Inspection
services.description: Thorough assessment of all major visible and accessible systems.

services.title: Pre-Listing Inspection
services.description: A full inspection before listing, helping you address issues early for a smoother sale.

services.title: Four Point Inspection
services.description: Focused evaluation of HVAC, electrical, plumbing, and roofing systems.

services.title: Wind Mitigation Inspection
services.description: Documentation of wind-resistant features that may help support insurance credits.

services.title: Storm Damage Assessment
services.description: Inspection to assess and document storm damage for repair planning or insurance purposes.

services.title: Roof Condition & Estimated Remaining Life Report
services.description: An insurance-ready report including condition assessment and estimated remaining life.

services.title: Detached Building Inspection
services.description: Inspection of a detached structure’s visible and accessible components — Two-car garage or smaller.

services.title: Pool & Spa Inspection
services.description: Assessment of pool equipment, surfaces, and safety features.

whyChooseUs.title: Clear, Easy-to-Read Reports
whyChooseUs.description: Organized findings you can actually understand and act on — no technical overload.

whyChooseUs.title: Drone-Assisted Roof Inspections
whyChooseUs.description: FAA certified aerial assessments for thorough roof coverage.

whyChooseUs.title: Engineering Mindset
whyChooseUs.description: Civil engineering background brings a disciplined, analytical approach to every inspection.

whyChooseUs.title: 30+ Years of Experience
whyChooseUs.description: Decades of professional experience applied to protecting your investment.

additionalServices.service: Roof Condition & Estimated Remaining Life Report

additionalServices.note: Only available with a Home Inspection

pricing.disclaimer: Final pricing may vary based on property size, age, location, and additional structures. We’ll confirm pricing before the inspection — no surprises.

processSteps.title: Request Your Inspection
processSteps.description: Tell us about the property and what you need. We’ll confirm pricing and schedule promptly.

processSteps.title: We Inspect
processSteps.description: Thorough, professional assessment of all major systems using modern tools and methods.

processSteps.title: Receive Your Report
processSteps.description: Clear, organized findings delivered quickly so you can move forward with confidence.
